library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, probably communal in nature– there are many communal lists from the turn of the 19th century matching this format (some of which also demonstrate reusage of Arabic-script documents). The heading on the Unclear if private or communal. Dating: the week of the Lekh Lekha parsha year 5558 AM appears at the top of one page = 1797/98 CE. There are also sums in eastern Arabic numerals and the opening lines of an Arabic letter that must have been cut up and reused for the subsequent recording of accounts. Needs further examination.
description_he: חשבונות בערבית-יהודית, כנראה קהילתיים; שבוע פרשת לך לך 5558 = 1797/98 לספירה; כולל ספרות ערביות מזרחיות ושורות פתיחה של מכתב ערבי שנחתך לשימוש מחדש
